title: canonical-project-model handoff contract
description: Shape of <model_dir>/model-handoff.json — the stable interface this plugin emits once the Canonical Project Record is assembled. Downstream tools (estimating, bid-leveling, scheduling, buyout, RFI/submittal, safety, logistics) read THIS to locate the model and know its status. Paths are relative to model_dir.

source_dossier.description: Path to the project-intake dossier this model was normalized from.

model_file.description: Relative path to canonical-model.json — the source of truth.

record_md.description: Relative path to the human-readable project-record.md.

sections.description: Per-section status + relative path. Absent keys mean nothing of that type was found.
